# AgentLog

Auto-log Claude Code prompts and Codex CLI turns to Obsidian Daily Notes.

AgentLog is a local CLI tool that hooks into Claude Code (UserPromptSubmit) and/or Codex CLI (agent-turn-complete notify) to append each prompt/turn to the Obsidian Daily Note for today, grouped by working directory and session.

## Install

```
npm install -g @albireo3754/agentlog
# or
bun add -g @albireo3754/agentlog
```

Requirements: Bun >=1.0.0 or Node.js >=20, Claude Code or Codex CLI, Obsidian.

## Setup

```
agentlog init ~/path/to/vault          # Claude Code hook (default)
agentlog init --codex ~/path/to/vault  # Codex CLI notify
agentlog init --all ~/path/to/vault    # Both
agentlog init --plain ~/notes          # Plain folder (no Obsidian)
```

`init` writes `~/.agentlog/config.json` and registers the hook in `~/.claude/settings.json` (Claude) or `~/.codex/config.toml` (Codex). The `agentlog` binary must remain in PATH after setup.

Run without arguments for interactive vault auto-detection.

## Commands

```
agentlog init [vault] [--plain] [--claude|--codex|--all]
    Configure vault and register hook(s).
    --claude  Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook (default)
    --codex   Codex CLI agent-turn-complete notify
    --all     Both integrations
    --plain   Write to plain folder instead of Obsidian vault

agentlog detect
    List detected Obsidian vaults and Obsidian CLI status.
    No config changes.

agentlog doctor
    Health check: binary, vault, Obsidian app, CLI, hook, Codex notify.
    Exits 1 if any required check fails.
    Warnings (cli, cli-ver, cli-app, daily) are non-fatal.

agentlog open
    Open today's Daily Note in Obsidian via CLI.
    Requires Obsidian 1.12+ with CLI enabled and app running.

agentlog uninstall [-y] [--codex|--all]
    (default)  Remove Claude hook + delete ~/.agentlog/
    --codex    Remove Codex notify from ~/.codex/config.toml only
    --all      Remove both integrations + delete ~/.agentlog/
    -y         Skip confirmation prompt

agentlog version
    Print version. Dev builds also show channel and commit.

agentlog hook         (internal — called by Claude Code, not by users)
agentlog codex-notify (internal — called by Codex, not by users)
```

## Configuration

`~/.agentlog/config.json`:

```json
{
  "vault": "/Users/you/Obsidian",
  "plain": false,
  "codexNotifyRestore": null
}
```

Fields:
- `vault` (required): absolute path to Obsidian vault or plain folder
- `plain` (optional): if true, writes simple YYYY-MM-DD.md files
- `codexNotifyRestore` (optional): saved previous Codex notify value, restored on uninstall

Environment variables:
- `AGENTLOG_CONFIG_DIR`: override config directory (default: `~/.agentlog`)
- `AGENTLOG_PHASE`: force channel `dev` or `prod`
- `OBSIDIAN_BIN`: override Obsidian CLI binary path

## Daily Note Output

Obsidian mode appends to a `## AgentLog` section, grouped by working directory:

```markdown
## AgentLog
> 🕐 11:21 — js/agentlog › initialize git

#### 10:53 · js/agentlog
<!-- cwd=/Users/you/work/js/agentlog -->
- - - - [[ses_a1b2c3d4]]
- 10:53 start building agentlog
- 11:07 open the spec document
- - - - [[ses_e5f6a7b8]]
- 11:21 initialize git
```

Plain mode appends to `{folder}/YYYY-MM-DD.md`:

```markdown
# 2026-03-02
- 10:53 start building agentlog
```

Daily Note path resolution order:
1. `obsidian daily:path` (Obsidian CLI 1.12+, app must be running)
2. Fallback: `{vault}/Daily/YYYY-MM-DD-<weekday>.md`

## How the Hook Works

Claude Code fires `UserPromptSubmit` with JSON on stdin containing `prompt`, `session_id`, and `cwd`. AgentLog sanitizes the prompt, resolves the Daily Note path, and appends the entry. Fails silently — never interrupts Claude Code. Total overhead: under 50ms per prompt.

Codex fires `agent-turn-complete` notify. Entries are logged when the turn completes (not at prompt submission time).

## Uninstall

```
agentlog uninstall        # Claude only
agentlog uninstall --codex  # Codex only
agentlog uninstall --all    # Both
```
